heading: Upper Taylors Arm vs Upper Tooloom — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Taylors Arm, New South Wales and Upper Tooloom, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Taylors Arm has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Upper Tooloom (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Taylors Arm or Upper Tooloom safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Taylors Arm has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Upper Tooloom scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Taylors Arm scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Tooloom scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Taylors Arm or Upper Tooloom?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Taylors Arm has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
